title: Fresh American Orange Stir-fry
description: This fresh and velvety dish features orange in a monsoon-inspired flavor profile, ideal for a light summer meal.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: use halal soy sauce if available

instructions: Wash the orange thoroughly and remove any blemishes. Slice it into thin strips.
In a wok or large frying pan, heat a small amount of oil over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced orange to the pan, tossing gently to prevent breaking apart the fruit.
Sprinkle with minced garlic and green onions (scallions).
Season with salt and pepper to taste. If desired, add rice vinegar for a tangy flavor, followed by soy sauce.
Stir-fry everything together until the orange slices are tender but still slightly crisp, about 5-7 minutes.
Serve hot as a light lunch or side dish.
